BroadcastState.title: BroadcastState
BroadcastState.description: Represents the full layout, scoreboard, timer, stats, and overlays state of a live stream broadcast.

syncKey.description: Unique key identifying the broadcast sync channel.

ownerUid.description: UID of the operator who owns and controls this broadcast state.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this broadcast state was last modified.

stateJson.description: Serialized JSON string of the BroadcastState object containing all game data and configuration.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents the personalized configuration and stream operator details for an authenticated user.

displayName.description: The custom display name of the operator.

role.description: The broadcast role/specialty of the operator.

favoriteSport.description: The primary sport the operator broadcasts.

fpsMode.description: Target FPS of the custom stream overlay (30 or 60).

audioCues.description: Whether interactive audio cues are enabled on the control panel.

setupCompleted.description: Flag indicating that user profile onboarding is complete.

/broadcast_states/{syncKey}.description: Stores current real-time stream state under a unique shareable sync key, accessible by OBS and controllers.

/user_profiles/{uid}.description: Stores customized operator settings and profile information per authenticated user.
